user_query:
I’m trying to support my daughter-in-law, Lena, kindly and keep our family aligned. Please use the files under input/ and produce the following deliverables under output/ (create the folder if it doesn’t exist):

1) output/rewritten_message.md
- Rewrite the message in input/message_draft.txt to be warm, respectful, and nonjudgmental.
- Length: 80–120 words.
- Include at least two concrete offers copied verbatim from the "Offers I can actually do" list in the file.
- Do not invent new offers.
- Do not use any of these words: should, try harder, tidy, fast life, travel, fancy friends, raised.
- Do not mention or judge her past lifestyle.

2) output/family_update.md
- Compose a single-family-group update (120–180 words) using only the facts in input/family_update_notes.txt.
- Must mention the baby’s name exactly as written in the notes.
- Mention each highlight and each schedule item at least once; do not add details not in the notes.
- End with one final line starting with "Note:" that includes both boundary sentences from the "Requests/Boundaries" section verbatim, joined on one line separated by a space.

3) From input/meeting_transcript.md, prepare:
- output/meeting_notes.md with:
  - Title line copied exactly from the transcript header.
  - Participants line copied exactly from the transcript header.
  - A Decisions section listing each DECISION item (in the original order), using the decision text exactly as it appears after the dash.
  - An Action Items section with one bullet per TODO in the form: Owner — Task — Due YYYY-MM-DD — Source L## (use the L-number from the transcript).
  - An Open Questions section listing each OPEN item text exactly as it appears after the dash.
- output/action_items.csv with header: owner,task,due_date,source_line and one row per TODO (owner and task from the TODO line, due_date as YYYY-MM-DD, source_line as the L-number, e.g., L07).

Do not use the Internet. Do not invent facts beyond what is in the inputs. Ensure all outputs meet the length and content constraints exactly. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
